name: French Breakfast Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl combine the flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, nutmeg, and salt. Make a well in the center of dry ingredients.
2. In another bowl beat the egg slightly; stir in milk and 1/3 cup melted butter or margarine. Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture. Stir just until moistened (the batter may be lumpy).
3. Lightly grease muffin cups. Fill cups about two-thirds full with batter.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20-25 minutes, or until muffins are golden.
5. Meanwhile, in a shallow bowl combine the 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon. Immediately dip the tops of hot muffins into the remaining melted butter or margarine, then into the cinnamon-sugar mixture until coated.
6. Serve warm.
